HUMAN TASKS:
1. Ensure GitHub repository settings are configured to use this PR template by default
2. Configure branch protection rules to enforce PR reviews and template completion
3. Set up GitHub Actions workflow to validate PR template fields
-->

## Type of Change
<!-- Select one or more types of change by replacing [ ] with [x] -->
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance Improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Test

## Description
<!-- Provide a detailed description of changes including motivation and context -->
### Summary of Changes
<!-- Describe what was changed and why -->

### Related Issue
<!-- Reference the GitHub issue number (e.g., #123) -->

### Implementation Approach
<!-- Explain the technical approach taken to implement the changes -->

### Breaking Changes
<!-- List any breaking changes and migration steps if applicable -->

### Performance Impact
<!-- Describe performance implications and measurements (<200ms requirement) -->

### Security Considerations
<!-- Detail any security implications and mitigations -->

## Bug Fix Details
<!-- Required if PR type is Bug Fix -->
### Bug Description
<!-- Describe the bug being fixed -->

### Root Cause
<!-- Explain what caused the bug -->

### Fix Approach
<!-- Detail how the bug was fixed -->

### Regression Testing
<!-- Describe testing done to ensure the bug won't recur -->

### Impact on Other Features
<!-- Explain any potential impact on other system features -->

## Testing
<!-- Describe testing approach and results -->
### Unit Tests
- [ ] Added/Updated unit tests
- Coverage percentage: <!-- Enter coverage % -->

### Integration Tests
- [ ] Added/Updated integration tests
- Coverage percentage: <!-- Enter coverage % -->

### E2E Tests
- [ ] Added/Updated E2E tests
- Test scenarios covered: <!-- List key scenarios -->

### Manual Testing
<!-- List manual testing steps performed -->

### Performance Testing
- [ ] Conducted performance testing
- Response times: <!-- Enter measured response times -->

### Browser Compatibility
- [ ] Tested in Chrome
- [ ] Tested in Firefox
- [ ] Tested in Safari
- [ ] Tested in Edge

## Checklist
<!-- Review and check all applicable items -->
- [ ] Code follows NextJS/React best practices
- [ ] TypeScript types are properly defined
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] Tests are passing with >80% coverage
- [ ] Performance impact is within acceptable limits (<200ms)
- [ ] Security implications reviewed
- [ ] Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) requirements met
- [ ] Database migrations are backward compatible
- [ ] Edge function deployment verified
- [ ] Environment variables documented

## Screenshots
<!-- Include relevant screenshots or recordings -->
